nodes.context: Russian mafia syndicate; Mogilevich was their key money-laundering contact in the 1980s.
Italian American Mafia family; involved in a toxic waste scheme with Mogilevich.
Italian organized crime group; Mogilevich had alliances with them, specifically the Giuliano clan.
Camorra clan; Salvatore De Falco was a member who met with Mogilevich in Prague.

edges.context: Mogilevich was the key money-laundering contact for the Solntsevskaya Bratva in the 1980s.
Mogilevich's lieutenants met with Genovese family associates to broker a toxic waste dumping scheme.
Mogilevich had alliances with the Camorra, particularly with the Giuliano clan.
Salvatore De Falco of the Giuliano clan met with Mogilevich in Prague in 1993.
